name: malmo-web-ui
comment:overrides: openapi-typescript@7.13.0 (Feb 2026) is clean, but its transitive ranges float to three 2026-05-25 packages inside the May 2026 npm-compromise window. These overrides pin them to the latest pre-May releases so the entire added closure predates the window (a pre-May release can't be affected by a May compromise). Revisit once the ecosystem's remediation status is confirmed. See docs/progress/openapi-codegen.md.
